definition: Containers carried on deck/hatches of ships not specially designed/fitted for containers.
securing_trigger: Stow fore-and-aft; lashings (wire/chain); timber shoring <=2m; secure to prevent sliding/tipping.

definition: Tank not permanently secured, >450 L, external stabilizing members; ISO or non-ISO frame.
securing_trigger: Lashing angle <=25 deg sliding, 45-60 deg tipping; CSC compliance; IMDG if DG.

definition: Receptacle (not a portable tank), capacity <= 1,000 L; cylinders, frames of cylinders.
securing_trigger: Dunnage off steel deck; stow upright for liquefied gas; box/crib, brace, chock.

definition: Cargoes on wheels/tracks: buses, tractors, earth-movers, roll-trailers (excl. road trailers/trains).
securing_trigger: Marked securing points; brakes set; chocks; lashings >= steel chain/wire; stow fore-and-aft.

definition: Heavy items such as locomotives, transformers, etc.
securing_trigger: CoG + bedding info; timber spread load; lashing 25 deg slide / 45-60 deg tip; shoring if large angles.
market_aliases: Project Cargo, Marble Blocks, Granite Blocks

definition: Coiled sheet steel stowed on the round (typically >10 t per coil).
securing_trigger: Bottom stow, axes fore-and-aft, dunnage athwartships, locking coils, wedges, top-tier lashing.

definition: Any heavy metal item: bars, pipes, rods, plates, billets, wire coils, etc.
securing_trigger: Compact side-to-side, no voids; do not exceed deck/tank-top load; shore every frame >=1m; top-layer lashing.
market_aliases: Steel Rebars, Steel Bars, Steel Billets, Wire Rod in Coils, Steel Plates, Steel Sheets, Steel Slabs, Steel Products, Steel Debars, DBIC

definition: Anchor chains in bundles or continuous lengths.
securing_trigger: Never on bare metal — wooden ceiling/dunnage; tight stow; top layer lashed both sides.

definition: Metal scrap difficult to stow compactly (excl. borings/shavings/turnings — those are IMSBC).
securing_trigger: Protect side plating/pipes; heavy first; no voids; lash/overstow heavy pieces; watch tank-top load.

definition: Flexible portable packaging for solids, capacity <= 3 m3 (3,000 L); one-way or multi-trip.
securing_trigger: Wide hatches; stow tight from sides to centre; chock voids in centre; gratings/plywood + wire lashings.

definition: Under-deck stowage of logs; bilge/stability/ballast precautions.
securing_trigger: Pre-stow plan; heaviest first; compact fore-and-aft, fill athwartship voids; bilge & stability checks.

definition: Packages on a pallet/load board, in a pallet box, or permanently secured in a sling.
securing_trigger: Clean flush deck; block stow no voids; gratings/plywood + wire lashings; check pallet strength if tiered.
market_aliases: Bagged Cargo, Sugar (bags), MDF Boards, Chipboards, General Cargo, Mixed BB
